pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 5) and verified in export_result.sh (line 31) and verifier.py (lines 71-72)
Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly states 'Lead/Opportunity (crm.lead)' and verifier.py line 48 checks for this exact model
Task description (task.json line 5) specifies subject as 'Following up: {{ object.name }}' and verifier.py line 57 checks for this placeholder
Task description (task.json line 5) requires 'A greeting using the partner's name: {{ object.partner_id.name }}' and verifier.py line 67 checks for this exact placeholder
Task description (task.json line 5) requires 'A reference to the opportunity name: {{ object.name }}' and verifier.py line 74 checks for this placeholder
Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly requires phrase 'Thank you for your interest' and verifier.py line 81 checks for 'thank you for your interest' with case-insensitive matching
Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly requires closing 'Best regards' and verifier.py line 88 checks for 'best regards' with case-insensitive matching

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new email template in Odoo CRM with template name 'Opportunity Follow-Up' applied to the crm.lead model. The template's subject must contain the dynamic placeholder {{ object.name }}, and the HTML body must include four required elements: the partner name placeholder {{ object.partner_id.name }}, the opportunity name placeholder {{ object.name }}, the phrase 'Thank you for your interest', and the closing 'Best regards'. All metadata claims have been independently verified against the task description and verifier code.
